channel.title: Vox Language Updates
channel.description: Changelog, release notes, and documentation updates for the Vox AI-native programming language, maintained by the Vox Foundation.

item.title: Shiki, mdBook & Documentation Platform Evaluation (2026)
item.description: Comprehensive research and quantified feature comparison of documentation site generators and syntax highlighting strategies for an AI-native, Rust-first codebase in 2026.

item.title: Golden Examples: Working Vox Code
item.description: Complete, validated Vox code examples demonstrating server functions, actors, workflows, MCP tools, and UI components in the Vox programming language.

item.title: Actors & Workflows
item.description: Deep dive into Vox's primary concurrency primitives: stateful actor functions for message-passing and durable workflow functions for reliable orchestration.

item.title: Rosetta Inventory: One Scenario, Four Languages
item.description: The same inventory merge across C++, Rust, Python, and Vox — not to show who wins, but to show what each language reveals about the problem.

item.title: Glossary: Vox Terminology
item.description: Authoritative vocabulary for the Vox language, runtime, and AI orchestration ecosystem.

item.title: How-To: Islands and Pages
item.description: How to build and route full-stack web UIs using islands in Vox.

item.title: How-To: Scale Actors
item.description: Strategies for distributing and managing Vox actor lifecycles across a cluster.

item.title: Journey: Reliable Background Workflows
item.description: How to escape brittle external job queues using Vox's native Durable Execution for microservice reliability.

item.title: Language Syntax Reference
item.description: A comprehensive, scannable syntax quick-reference page.

item.title: Web Model Reference
item.description: Reference for building APIs and interactive frontends with the Vox web model.

item.title: Design token system
item.description: How vox.tokens.json is validated by the compiler and how tokens map to CSS custom properties.

item.title: Tutorial: Persistent Actors & State
item.description: Master stateful concurrency in Vox. Learn to define, spawn, and persist actor state across system restarts.

item.title: GUI-Native Language Roadmap — Execution Status
item.description: Live tracking of task completion for the Vox GUI-native language roadmap (April 2026).

item.title: MENS Training — Architecture Pointer
item.description: Pointer page: procedural detail lives in the reference section.

item.title: Tutorial: Building UI with Islands
item.description: Learn how to build modern, reactive user interfaces with Vox using islands.

item.title: ADR 001 — Burn Backend Selection for vox-tensor
item.description: Official documentation for ADR 001 — Burn Backend Selection for vox-tensor for the Vox language. Detailed technical reference, architectu

item.title: ADR 002 — Diátaxis Three-Tier Documentation Architecture
item.description: Grounded documentation architecture for Vox: mdBook front door, contributor surfaces, contracts, and status vocabulary.

item.title: ADR 003 — Native Rust Training Over Python
item.description: Historical move off Python/Unsloth; current Mens training is native Candle + qlora-rs QLoRA via vox mens train (see mens-training SSOT).

item.title: ADR 004: Codex over Arca over Turso
item.description: Official documentation for ADR 004: Codex over Arca over Turso for the Vox language. Detailed technical reference, architecture guides, a

item.title: ADR 005: Socrates anti-hallucination SSOT
item.description: Official documentation for ADR 005: Socrates anti-hallucination SSOT for the Vox language. Detailed technical reference, architecture gui

item.title: ADR 006: Mens full-graph Candle QLoRA with qlora-rs
item.description: Official documentation for ADR 006: Mens full-graph Candle QLoRA with qlora-rs for the Vox language.

item.title: ADR 007: qlora-rs multi-layer training API (Phase 2c architecture gate)
item.description: Official documentation for ADR 007: qlora-rs multi-layer training API (Phase 2c architecture gate) for the Vox language.

item.title: ADR 008: Mens transport
item.description: Official documentation for ADR 008: Mens transport for the Vox language. Detailed technical reference, architecture guides, and implement

item.title: ADR 009: Hosted mens / BaaS (future scope)
item.description: Official documentation for ADR 009: Hosted mens / BaaS (future scope) for the Vox language. Detailed technical reference, architecture gu

item.title: ADR 010 — TanStack as the Vox web spine
item.description: Official documentation for ADR 010 — TanStack as the Vox web spine for the Vox language. Detailed technical reference, architecture guide

item.title: v0.8.0 — @require, @pure, @deprecated Decorators; 10 LSP Features
item.description: Added @require, @pure, and @deprecated decorators. Implemented 10 Language Server Protocol features including hover, go-to-definition, and inline diagnostics.

item.title: v0.7.0 — QLoRA Training Pipeline; Socrates Anti-Hallucination Protocol
item.description: Native QLoRA fine-tuning via Candle and qlora-rs. Socrates confidence protocol integrated into the orchestrator for anti-hallucination validation of agent outputs.

item.title: v0.6.0 — Mens Transport; Durable Workflow Runtime MVP
item.description: CPU-first mens registry with optional HTTP control plane. Interpreted workflow runtime MVP supporting local and mens activity hooks.
